Bash(BASE="C:/Users/Leo/OneDrive/Área de Trabalho/TrabFinal"
SRC="$BASE/src"
BIN="$BASE/bin"
LIB="$BASE/lib/mysql-connector-j-8.0.33.jar"

rm -rf "$BIN"
mkdir -p "$BIN"

  "$SRC/entities/"*.java \\
  "$SRC/enums/"*.java \\
  "$SRC/exceptions/"*.java \\
  "$SRC/interfaces/"*.java \\
  "$SRC/validators/"*.java \\
  "$SRC/db/"*.java \\
  "$SRC/repositories/"*.java \\
  "$SRC/repositories/mysql/"*.java \\
  "$SRC/services/"*.java \\

  "$SRC/App.java" 2>&1)
